about.bio1: I am Dharun N, currently pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics and Communication Engineering at M Kumarasamy College of Engineering.
about.bio2: I am passionate about building innovative solutions using IoT and embedded systems. I have worked on multiple real-world projects and I am currently growing as a web developer.
about.bio3: My long-term goal is to work in a core technology company, gain industry experience, and eventually build my own startup.

projects.title: Gas Sensor Detector
projects.description: A system designed to detect harmful gases in the environment and alert users in real-time for safety and prevention.

projects.title: Smart Accident Notification
projects.description: Automatically sends alerts during vehicle accidents using sensors and GPS, enabling faster emergency response.

projects.title: Wireless Water Bottle
projects.description: Smart hydration tracking system that monitors water intake wirelessly and reminds users to stay hydrated.

projects.title: Smart Security System
projects.description: IoT-based home security solution with real-time monitoring, motion detection, and instant mobile alerts.

projects.title: Irrigation Water Quality Monitor
projects.description: Uses TDS sensor, ESP8266, and cloud storage to monitor irrigation water quality in real-time for agriculture.

achievements.title: 3rd Place – National Level Symposium
achievements.text: Secured 3rd place in Paper Presentation at a National Level Symposium, competing against top engineering students.

achievements.title: 2nd Place – Googler Event
achievements.text: Achieved 2nd place at the Googler Event, demonstrating strong technical and analytical skills.
